name: cohrence
description: Detects documentation-vs-code drift and proposes surgical patches

slashCommands.name: coherence:status
slashCommands.description: Show current coherence state: buffer, recent activity, subagent stats, velocity, cost

slashCommands.name: coherence:review
slashCommands.description: Run the coherence pipeline mid-session against the current buffer

slashCommands.name: coherence:repair
slashCommands.description: Fix anchor collisions, schema drift, buffer corruption, pending.md mismatches

slashCommands.name: coherence:recover
slashCommands.description: Clear quarantine, reset locks, drop progress files, remove auto-disable sentinel

slashCommands.name: coherence:doctor
slashCommands.description: Probe host capabilities and write host-capabilities.json

slashCommands.name: coherence:graduate
slashCommands.description: Toggle between Observe and Graduated mode

slashCommands.name: coherence:enable-sidecars
slashCommands.description: Provision sidecar YAML files for skills/agents when host strips unknown frontmatter

slashCommands.name: coherence:share-metrics
slashCommands.description: Write anonymized metrics to a user-chosen file path

slashCommands.name: coherence:propose-list
slashCommands.description: List queued and surfaced v0.2 proposals (DD-081)

slashCommands.name: coherence:propose-show
slashCommands.description: Show a single proposal by id (DD-081)

slashCommands.name: coherence:propose-accept
slashCommands.description: Accept a proposal and materialise it under .claude/ (DD-082)

slashCommands.name: coherence:propose-reject
slashCommands.description: Reject a surfaced proposal (DD-088)

slashCommands.name: coherence:propose-revert-acceptance
slashCommands.description: Revert an accepted proposal (DD-083)

slashCommands.name: coherence:install-statusline
slashCommands.description: Install the coherence statusline into ~/.claude/settings.json (FR-STATUSLINE-2)

slashCommands.name: coherence:uninstall-statusline
slashCommands.description: Restore the statusline backup created by install-statusline (FR-STATUSLINE-3)

slashCommands.name: coherence:annotate
slashCommands.description: Generate an annotation proposal for an anchor-less doc (DD-069)

slashCommands.name: coherence:scope-debug
slashCommands.description: Print walked CLAUDE.md/coherence/scope.json ancestors and resolved scope for a path (DD-097)

slashCommands.name: coherence:ignore-split
slashCommands.description: Set up the two-file additive ignore model: coherence/ignore (committed) + coherence/ignore.local (gitignored) (DD-096)

slashCommands.name: coherence:export-metrics
slashCommands.description: Write redacted metrics.jsonl to a user-supplied path; prints copy-paste curl only with upload consent (DD-115)

slashCommands.name: coherence:de-annotate
slashCommands.description: Strip auto-annotations or graduate them to user-owned anchors (DD-102/DD-110)
